about.page_subtitle: Pioneering astronomy education in Bangladesh since 2018.
about.story_p1: Founded in 2018, Astronomy Pathshala started with a simple yet ambitious goal: to make the wonders of the universe accessible to every student in Bangladesh. We noticed that while students were curious about space, there were few resources to guide them systematically.
about.story_p2: Today, we are the country's leading platform for astronomy education, training students for International Olympiads and cultivating the next generation of astrophysicists.
about.mission_text: To ignite curiosity about the cosmos in young minds and provide world-class astronomy education that empowers Bangladeshi students to compete on the global stage.
about.vision_text: To build a scientifically literate society where every child can look up at the stars and understand the universe, fostering a culture of research and exploration.

contact.page_subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.mission: Empowering the next generation of astronomers with world-class education and accessible technology.
